name: environment-extension-pattern
description: IEnvironment interface defines service injection slots. Services accessed via getEnv<IEnvironment>(self).services.auth in MST actions. Environment passed to createStore() factory. Pattern supports optional services (auth?: IAuthService).
relevantCode: export interface IEnvironment { services: { persistence: IPersistenceService; auth?: IAuthService; } }
recommendation: Extend IEnvironment with teams service slot: ITeamsEnvironment extends IEnvironment { services: { ...base, teams: ITeamsService } }
